summary: PTR build #17 (bug fixes; Holy Pal/Brewmaster set changes). Tiers 4/5 (Wowhead 403; WoWMeta +28 recluster). Metrics+encounters refreshed. WCL rdps-broken 5 unreach/3 raw. 4 takes/7 metaNotes.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) re-fetched live via curl; parsed <table class=tier-list> (<td> tier letter + img alt spec). Era-verified Midnight S1 / 12.0.7 (Devourer present). 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs committed (parser reproduces committed exactly). Snapshots 07-24.

Both pages re-fetched live; parsed the main tierlist container (data-original-title spec names under tier__title). Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream = absence, not error) + M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-24.

All Wowhead tier pages unreachable this run: r.jina.ai returned HTTP 403 for this runner IP across every URL all run (news + guide), and direct Wowhead is Cloudflare-403 from the runner. All 40 raid + 40 M+ Wowhead tiers kept at committed values via upsert; page snapshots left at 07-22/07-23 (~2 days, within maxAgeDays 4).

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages re-parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection (icon 'Class-Spec' → roster); Archon lastUpdated 07-23. 80 rows, 0 unmatched, 5 tier moves vs committed (raid Arms/Elemental/Enhancement B→A, M+ Resto Sham S→A, M+ Disc Priest A→B = normal Archon daily churn). Snapshots 07-24.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection. 680 cells, 59 changed vs committed (normal daily churn), 0 unmatched. encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-24.
Survivability tierList re-parsed from all 3 raid pages: 27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank = 40 rows, merged via apply-metrics survivability key. asOf 07-24.

Re-read from __NEXT_DATA__ specRankingsSection.table.data[] (NOT tierList): 95th pct DPS (Mythic) 33 rows (raid DPS+tank), 95th pct HPS (Mythic) 7 (raid healer), M+ score (95th pct) 40 (all M+ roles). asOf 07-24 (Archon lastUpdated 07-23); previous stored 07-20.

Popularity % (fraction×100) from specRankingsSection.table.data[] across all 6 pages = 80 rows (raid 40 + M+ 40). asOf 07-24; previous stored 07-20. Parsed cleanly from specRankingsSection, not tierList (the 07-21 stall root cause).

3 M+ pages re-fetched via DIRECT fetch (r.jina.ai was IP-403 all run; SvelteKit now SSRs the tier data). Parsed the alt='X tier' table AND cross-checked the per-spec 'top-0 absolute' badge (both agree). Era-verified 'Mythic+ Season 1 / MN 12.0.7' — NO season flip. 40/40 specs (S/A/B/C/D), 0 unmatched. 28 M+ tier moves = another Ckmeans reset-week recluster (tracks representation; verified vs the page, NOT a Blizzard retune — consensus moved only 9 bands, 0 two-band). Raid pages still unranked upstream. Snapshots 07-24.

Per wcl-fetch/evidence.json (verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-24T12:05Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. No evidence.landed entry for this cut; agent holds no WCL creds and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken, no landed entry); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken, no landed entry); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken, no landed entry); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken, no landed entry); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians BEFORE the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:196 3T:140 5T:2000). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-24.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar & Ula'tek 0 = untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-24.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 1049-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-24.
40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) re-fetched live via plain GET; parsed each meta-item card by display name → rating-before-. Era-verified Midnight Season 1. Range 3738-4288. asOf 07-24.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles re-fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; simc_settings.tier == MID1 confirmed on every chart; targets 1/2/3/5/8/15 taken as best-build per count. Augmentation absent by design. asOf 07-24.

Nightly MID1_Raid.html (37 MB) re-fetched; parsed the #raid_dps highcharts single-target series ({name:'MID1_Class_Spec_Hero', y:dps}, best hero-variant per spec, JS-function-safe brace extraction) = 26/26 DPS (Frost DK 137690 ≈ committed 137691). Build MID1 (12.0.7), no season flip. Tanks/healers/Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-24.

Period 1073 (same id as prior run) re-fetched live via DIRECT fetch of /period/latest (r.jina.ai IP-403; SvelteKit SSRs the data). The week's keys accumulated since 07-23 so 37/40 representation values moved (Devourer 8.5→12.1, Aug 4.4→8.1). All 40 specs parsed, era 'Period 1073 MID1', no season flip. asOf 07-24.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. NEW build logged: forum post #17 (Linxy, 2026-07-23, 'Additional changes / Class Bug Fixes') — mostly bug fixes plus targeted tuning (Resto Druid Regrowth -20%, Mistweaver Morning Breeze -60%, Disc Void Shield +3%) and TWO set-bonus changes: Holy Paladin VA 4-set now adds +60% Holy Light mana cost (+5% healing), Brewmaster VA 4-set Flurry Strikes bug fix — both tierSet.asOf bumped to 07-23. PTR now a release candidate but still PTR (thread still '12.1 PTR Development Notes', no season flip). Wowhead's Sub Rogue/Holy Pal tier-set datamine article was jina/CF-403 from the runner — Holy Pal captured from the forum; the Sub Rogue tier-set change is not in the forum notes and was NOT ingested (unverifiable from runner).

All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK). Deterministic transcript step fetched all 4 queued 07-22 videos (summary.json verdict ok). Distilled 4 specialist takes: Kesslive beBJZnCXF0s (Augmentation buff / Devastation nerf-sentiment), Kalamazi C82WusrvQ1E (Destruction neutral — Aff/Demo already covered by the 07-22 Xy8iV9-WcRI takes, transcript-verified as duplicate, not re-added), MadSkillzzTV 32hM_eLonR4 (Resto Shaman buff). izen 0mtKobeslFA (generalCreator) → 7 new metaNotes (build-#16 reaction). Superseded 6 older takes + 6 older metaNotes. Queued 7 new in-scope videos (no transcript to the agent); izen latest refreshed to 6G_Sg4xJol4. Pending queue 4→7.
